title: Ninth Orbit
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: Aboard a generation ship whose orbit has decayed, a maintenance crew finds the captain's log from two centuries ago revealing that the voyage has no destination — the mission was exile, not colonization.
long_description: Aboard a generation ship whose orbit has decayed, a maintenance crew finds the captain's log from two centuries ago revealing that the voyage has no destination — the mission was exile, not colonization.
